notes:

title: Archero 2
notes:
1. Added Legendary Heroes Demeter and Artemis and exclusive Skins.
2. Added Guild Raid, Camp Visit, Friendly Duel, Charm System, Titles, and Rankings.
3. Rumble Ladder S3 begins with the new 3v3 Football Rumble mode.

6. Added defensive bonuses in Peak Arena.
7. Improved Guild Expedition stats, event chat, and scoring.
8. Reduced chapter difficulty and fixed various issues.

title: Diablo Immortal
notes:
You don’t fight Hell — you command it. Bloodied Jewel unleashes new horrors in Lut Gholein, featuring new story content, 3 Helliquary bosses, and Ancient Legendary gear worth killing for. 

HELL OBEYS ME! Harness forbidden infernal magic as the Warlock, summoning devastating fiends and sacrificing everything for absolute power.
